'''nangutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvular|uvular]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvular|uvular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nangutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nængitith|nængitith]] || [[word:nængitij|nængitij]] || [[word:nængitish|nængitish]] || [[word:nængiti|nængiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangungututh|nangungututh]] || [[word:nangungutuj|nangungutuj]] || [[word:nangungutush|nangungutush]] || [[word:nangungutu|nangungutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangututh|nangututh]] || [[word:nangutuj|nangutuj]] || [[word:nangutush|nangutush]] || [[word:nangutu|nangutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nanguftuth|nanguftuth]] || [[word:nanguftuj|nanguftuj]] || [[word:nanguftush|nanguftush]] || [[word:nanguftuf|nanguftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nangututhu|nangututhu]] || [[word:nangutuju|nangutuju]] || [[word:nangutushu|nangutushu]] || [[word:nangutuku|nangutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nangututh|nangututh]] || [[word:nangutuj|nangutuj]] || [[word:nangutush|nangutush]] || [[word:nangutu|nangutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nangututhul|nangututhul]] || [[word:nangutujul|nangutujul]] || [[word:nangutushul|nangutushul]] || [[word:nangutukul|nangutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nangututhuthu|nangututhuthu]] || [[word:nangutujuju|nangutujuju]] || [[word:nangutushushu|nangutushushu]] || [[word:nangutuku|nangutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nangututhun|nangututhun]] || [[word:nangutujun|nangutujun]] || [[word:nangutushun|nangutushun]] || [[word:nangutukun|nangutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nangututhuoro|nangututhuoro]] || [[word:nangutujuoro|nangutujuoro]] || [[word:nangutushuoro|nangutushuoro]] || [[word:nangutukuoro|nangutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
